name: Blackeye Peas Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 15 oz can peeled tomatoes, drained or equivalent amount of fresh tomatoes (~1.5 cups)
1 15 oz can Black Eye Peas, drained
2 cups cooked white rice (I used a mixture of white/brown basmati)
Salt, pepper, garlic powder for seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and saute it in a good size frying pan with the broth.
2. If using fresh tomatoes, add them and cook until they are soft.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients and heat through.
Makes about 3-4 servings, as a main course casserole.
